text:
On Thu, Aug 15, 2013 at 11:10:25AM +0200, Jeremie Le Hen wrote:

> Bryan, can you please do an exp-run with it?

Updated without a typo.  Note that the output on the GNAT web interface
is mangled, but indentation is correct.

-- 
Jeremie Le Hen

Scientists say the world is made up of Protons, Neutrons and Electrons.
They forgot to mention Morons.
